## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (ruff + mypy + pytest)
- [ ] `make smoke` passes (if touching model/rag/eval/serving)
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs/) if user-facing
- [ ] No datasets, checkpoints, or secrets committed
